results.rendered_html:
avahārya (von har im caus. mit ava) adj.
1〉 der zu erstatten, zu bezahlen anzuhalten ist, mit dem acc.: avahāryo bhaveccaiva — ṣaṭśataṃ damam  M. 8,198 .
— 2〉 was man erstatten lassen muss: avahāryau bhavetāṃ tau (ādhiścopanidhiśca)  M. 8,145 .

results.rendered_html:
avahārya pot. p.
1 To be taken away or removed.
2 Finable, punishable;  Ms. 8. 198. 
3 What one is forced to restore or redeem; ādhiścopanidhiścobhau na kālātyayamarhataḥ . avahāryau bhavetāṃ tau dīrghakālamavasthitau ..  Ms. 8. 145. 
4 To be completed,
5 Recoverable, redeemable.
